target_market_label.zh: 加拿大（纺织品标签 / CCPSA）
target_market_label.zht: 加拿大（紡織品標籤 / CCPSA）

title.en: China-to-Canada Textiles & Apparel Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国纺织品及服装进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國紡織品及服裝進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China textile and apparel documentation against Canada's Textile Labelling Act and Textile Labelling and Advertising Regulations, Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, Textile Flammability Regulations SOR/2016-194, Children's Sleepwear Regulations SOR/2016-169, Phthalates Regulations, and lead limits for children's products.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国纺织品及服装文件与加拿大《纺织品标签法》《纺织品标签和广告条例》《加拿大消费品安全法》、纺织品易燃性条例SOR/2016-194、儿童睡衣条例SOR/2016-169、邻苯二甲酸酯条例及儿童产品铅限制的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國紡織品及服裝文件與加拿大《紡織品標籤法》《紡織品標籤和廣告條例》《加拿大消費品安全法》、紡織品易燃性條例SOR/2016-194、兒童睡衣條例SOR/2016-169、鄰苯二甲酸酯條例及兒童產品鉛限制的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, laboratory assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and brands should verify current Canadian law, bilingual labelling rules, CCPSA requirements, and product-specific regulations with qualified legal and technical professionals before shipment. Regulatory text is evolving; always consult the current consolidated version of each Act or regulation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、实验室评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和品牌方在出货前应与合格法律及技术专业人士核验现行加拿大法律、双语标签规则、CCPSA要求及具体产品条例。法规文本持续更新，请务必参阅各法律或条例的现行整合版本。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、實驗室評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和品牌方在出貨前應與合格法律及技術專業人士核驗現行加拿大法律、雙語標籤規則、CCPSA要求及具體產品條例。法規文本持續更新，請務必參閱各法律或條例的現行整合版本。

answer_first.en: Canada-bound textiles and apparel are not CE-marked and do not use an EU-style harmonised-standard route. The main gaps for Chinese exporters are: (1) mandatory fibre-content and dealer-identity labelling under the Textile Labelling Act and Textile Labelling and Advertising Regulations, with required information generally in English and French and a dealer name/address or CA identification number; (2) mandatory consumer product safety duties under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, including textile flammability rules under SOR/2016-194; (3) children's sleepwear must meet SOR/2016-169 flame resistance and labelling rules; (4) children's products may trigger phthalates and lead restrictions under CCPSA regulations, especially plasticized components, prints, coatings, trims, and accessible parts.
answer_first.zh: 出口加拿大的纺织品及服装无需CE标志，也不采用欧盟式协调标准路径。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）依据《纺织品标签法》及《纺织品标签和广告条例》，纤维含量和经销商身份标签为强制要求，必要信息通常须以英文和法文显示，并标注经销商名称/地址或CA识别号；（2）依据《加拿大消费品安全法》，消费品安全义务为强制要求，包括SOR/2016-194项下的纺织品易燃性规则；（3）儿童睡衣须符合SOR/2016-169的阻燃和标签要求；（4）儿童产品可能触发CCPSA条例下的邻苯二甲酸酯和铅限制，尤其是塑化部件、印花、涂层、装饰件和可接触部件。
answer_first.zht: 出口加拿大的紡織品及服裝無需CE標誌，也不採用歐盟式協調標準路徑。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）依據《紡織品標籤法》及《紡織品標籤和廣告條例》，纖維含量和經銷商身份標籤為強制要求，必要信息通常須以英文和法文顯示，並標注經銷商名稱/地址或CA識別號；（2）依據《加拿大消費品安全法》，消費品安全義務為強制要求，包括SOR/2016-194項下的紡織品易燃性規則；（3）兒童睡衣須符合SOR/2016-169的阻燃和標籤要求；（4）兒童產品可能觸發CCPSA條例下的鄰苯二甲酸酯和鉛限制，尤其是塑化部件、印花、塗層、裝飾件和可接觸部件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Justice Laws, Competition Bureau, Health Canada, and Canada.ca sources. Local PDFs and secondary summaries are not accepted as primary sources.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
